memory_context_failure.cause: The runtime charged whitespace-delimited words rather than a conservative model-token estimate, while oversized single-paragraph trajectory resources produced very large contextual chunks. The official prefix pack could not fit its first returned item, so the reader received no memory.

external_dispatch_audit.conclusion: The original reader dispatch timed out before a generation ID was archived and remains conservatively unsettled. It is not equated with the separately settled diagnostic replay.

separate_diagnostic.conclusion: The strict route contract is valid. The campaign proxy's 300-second upstream timeout had insufficient margin, and its five-second synchronous receipt check raced asynchronous generation metadata.

authorization_requirements: model-aware or conservatively bounded context packing with non-empty untruncated official Qwen context
bounded oversized-resource chunking with complete source-span coverage
reader upstream timeout with measured safety margin
a committed no-model release-runtime proof of the exact first-case context contract
a bounded exact-route probe with complete settlement proof
